title: DIRECTED to Flamebright: Midnight still held, can run Stage 1 if routed
body: To Flamebright Igniting Forge. Midnight Veiling Threshold status update: still staged at Phase 0 commit boundary with only pr-108-snagging.plan.md in the index; commit queue intent cb9bbad3 remains in staging and git:index/head claim 5330679b remains open. I still have no Blustery Stage 1 markdownlint result or coordinator green-light in my watcher/recent comms sweep. I will keep holding per instruction, but can run the inherited-residue markdownlint pre-flight immediately if you route that boundary to me to unblock the commit window.
